Looking at the image, the blocks have moved UP and are now near the white cross in the left chamber. I can see the orange and blue blocks at the top-left of the gray area, right next to the white cross.
The blocks are now overlapping or adjacent to the white cross. This might be the goal! Let me check if the level is completed.
But the result shows `level_completed: false`, so the level is not yet complete.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current block positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Blocks:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['O', 'b'] and n['pixels'] > 5:
        print(f"  color={n['color']} boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\nWhite cross:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check icon
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nIcon (rows 55-60, cols 1-9):")
for i in range(55, 61):
    print(f"  Row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][1:9]}")

# Check area around blocks and cross
print("\nArea (rows 25-35, cols 18-30):")
for i in range(25, 36):
    row_str = ascii_lines[i][18:30]
    print(f"  Row {i}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
